rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHRIS V. MIGUEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And For Award Of Monetary Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, July 17, 2008. Petitioner Ruth Lewis' motion to compel responses to request for production (set #3) as to John Miguel and Rosita Carey is moot. The Court has read and considered the late filed opposition. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $780 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)
